file_insights.mocking_strategy: vi.mock for Redis, manual mocks for EventService

file_insights.status: created but not shown in diff

patterns_discovered.description: Mock factories (createMockCart, createMockCartItem, etc.) with override parameters enable flexible test data creation while maintaining defaults
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces test boilerplate and improves maintainability

patterns_discovered.description: All test cases follow consistent Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with clear comments
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves readability and makes test intent clear

patterns_discovered.description: Tests verify both return values and mock invocations (e.g., checking emitCustom was called with correct parameters)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures service dependencies are properly utilized

patterns_discovered.description: Tests include validation for error conditions (unavailable products, limit exceeded, missing items)
Tests grouped by operation type (Read Operations, Add Item, Update Item, etc.) with section comments
patterns_discovered.benefit: Logical organization makes it easy to locate related tests

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple levels of mocking (Redis, EventService, nested objects) require careful beforeEach setup and vi.clearAllMocks()
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear mocks at start of each test to prevent cross-test contamination

gotchas_discovered.description: Using spread operator for overrides in factory functions requires understanding default values and potential conflicts
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Factory functions should document which fields can be overridden

gotchas_discovered.description: EventService.emitCustom must return resolved promises for async tests, requires proper Mock type casting
CartItem IDs follow pattern 'ci_<cartId>_<randomId>', tests must account for this when creating fixtures
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Mock IDs explicitly in test data rather than relying on generation

approach_outcome.description: Created comprehensive unit test suite for CartService with 1014+ lines of test code covering all major operations
test_categories: Read operations (getCart, getOrCreateCart, getCartItem, getItemCount, exists)
Add item operations with product validation and variant handling

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting mock factories to a shared test utilities file to reuse across other service tests (OrderService, etc.)
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication and ensures consistent test data structure across modules

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests that verify CartService works correctly with actual Redis implementation
recommendations.rationale: Current tests mock Redis completely; integration tests would catch Redis schema or serialization issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add JSDoc comments to individual test cases describing the scenario being tested and expected outcome
recommendations.rationale: Improves test readability and helps future developers understand test intent

recommendations.recommendation: Verify that error assertions test error messages content, not just error type
recommendations.rationale: Ensures proper error context is provided to API consumers

recommendations.recommendation: Consider using test.concurrent for independent test cases to improve test execution speed
recommendations.rationale: 1000+ line test file could benefit from parallel execution of non-interdependent tests
